summary: Valeteck v5 — 'Meus ganhos' feature validated end-to-end. Backend pytest: 12/12 PASS (100%). Frontend mobile (390x844): all listed testIDs present and wired correctly. Hero card, 4 period tabs, 3 stats cards, company bars, type chips, job list navigation, and price-table toggle all working. BRL formatting uses comma decimals (e.g., 'R$ 1315,00'). Técnico has 12 sent checklists; total_net=R$1315,00 (Valeteck R$1040 + Rastremix R$275); breakdown_by_company and breakdown_by_type sums match total_net exactly.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is now 964 lines (was 790 in v4) — still past the 700-line guideline. Consider splitting into routers (auth, reference, appointments, checklists, device, earnings).
_sla_bonus returns 0 when elapsed_sec == 0, which is correct; but this also means legacy checklists without execution_elapsed_sec never earn bonus, which is the intended v5 behavior per spec.
GET /api/earnings/me uses $or with sent_at fallback to created_at — correct handling when sent_at is missing. Confirmed period=day/week/month filters work (day<=week<=month<=all monotonic).
EarningsSummary.total_net is recomputed server-side as total_base + total_bonus (avoids drift). Verified sum of breakdown_by_company == total_net within 0.05 tolerance.
PRICE_TABLE hardcoded in server.py is acceptable MVP choice; if empresas/tipos ever move to Mongo, /api/earnings/price-table can be switched to read from db.

Frontend BRL() formatter uses toFixed(2).replace('.', ',') — does NOT insert thousands separator ('R$ 1315,00' vs spec example 'R$ 1.315,00'). Not a functional bug but differs from spec example format.
seed_data_creation: One TEST_V5 rascunho was created in test_drafts_not_included and cleaned up via DELETE at teardown. No persistent seed data left.
context_for_next_testing_agent: v5 testIDs verified: earnings-button (home header), earnings-back, toggle-pricing, period-day|week|month|all, hero-total, total-amount, company-bar-{empresa} (Valeteck, Rastremix currently), price-table, job-{id}. Login: tecnico@valeteck.com/tecnico123. Tecnico has 12 sent checklists → total_net=R$1315,00 (1040 Valeteck + 275 Rastremix; types: Instalação 1160 + Manutenção 155). fast_count=0 because existing sent jobs have execution_elapsed_sec in {0, 2100} — no <1800 samples in seed; SLA bonus math was validated via unit-style assertion per job. BRL format uses comma decimals but no thousands dot: 'R$ 1315,00' — main agent may want to match spec example 'R$ 1.315,00' by switching BRL() to toLocaleString('pt-BR', {style:'currency', currency:'BRL'}). Backend tests file: /app/backend/tests/test_valeteck_v5.py. pytest command: EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL=https://installer-track-1.preview.emergentagent.com pytest backend/tests/test_valeteck_v5.py -v.
rca_of_issue: No bugs found for v5. Minor spec-format discrepancy in BRL formatter (missing thousands separator) documented under critical_code_review_comments for main agent's optional polish.
